allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'Origin evil.example -> HTTP %{http_code} \(vuln if 2xx\)\\n' -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Origin: http://evil.example' -d '{"email":"po@team.com","password":"password123"}')

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'Origin evil.example -> HTTP %{http_code}\\n' -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Origin: http://evil.example' -d '{"email":"po@team.com","password":"password123"}')

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'Origin localhost:3000 -> HTTP %{http_code}\\n' -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3000' -d '{"email":"po@team.com","password":"password123"}')
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'no Origin -> HTTP %{http_code}\\n' -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"po@team.com","password":"password123"}')

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'signup xorigin -> HTTP %{http_code}\\n' -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/signup -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Origin: http://evil.example' -d '{"name":"x","email":"z@z.com","password":"password123","role":"SCRUM_MASTER"}')
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'logout xorigin -> HTTP %{http_code}\\n' -X POST http://localhost:3000/auth/logout -H 'Origin: http://evil.example')
